utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , Phoebe , this Dr . Oberman . He has no strong feelings about Fonzie or any of the Happy Days gang .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hi ! And you are going into what grade ?

utterances.speaker: Dr. Oberman
utterances.text: Umm , I am actually a first year resident , but I get that a lot , you see , I ... I graduated early .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I am actually a first year resident , but I get that a lot , you see , I ... I graduated early .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Uh ... huh , me too . Ross , maybe I should have specified that I would be needing a grown up doctor .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I would be needing a grown up doctor .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Oberman
utterances.text: Oh no , really , I am fully qualified ...

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Does not anybody understand that I am gonna be having babies soon ?

utterances.speaker: Frank
utterances.text: Oh cool ! You made him cry !
